The hotel is within a 10-minute walk of Da Lat Market and Da Lat Flower Gardens. Bao Dai's Summer Palace is a 15-minute walk away, and the popular Valley of Love is accessible within a 20-minute drive of the hotel. Lien Khuong Airport is 19 miles away.

Elegantly furnished, the air-conditioned rooms feature parquet floors, a personal safe, minibar, a flat-screen satellite TV and a sitting area. The private marble bathrooms have a bathtub or a shower, a hairdryer and free toiletries.

Saigon Dalat Hotel provides a business center, as well as rental of the meeting rooms or the conference hall. Ticketing and sightseeing arrangements can be made at the tour desk, and luggage storage, currency exchange and a laundry service are additional available conveniences.

Both Orchid Restaurant and the Tulip Restaurant serve a variety of Western dishes, and Le Moulin Rouge features tasty Asian cuisine, along with views of Hoang Van Thu Street. A range of snacks, wines and cocktails are served at Moonlight Bar, as well as at Camellia Bar & Café.

A lot of office buildings and the busiest shopping center surrounded it. The neoclassical architecture associated with Saigon's history in the early years of the 18th century, mixed with modern equipment of the 21st century, will give customers a unique experience only available at Kin.

KiN Hotel Ly Tu Trong Edition, belonging to Kin Hotel Group, is located just steps away from the famous Ben Thanh Market. Here, you can find local souvenirs, snacks, coffee beans, and unique trinkets. The hotel is the perfect starting point for discovering Saigon. 5 min walk from Independence Palace, 7 min walk to Takashimaya mall, 7 min walk to Ho Chi Minh City Museum. You’ll find yourself surrounded by city landmarks, cafes, eateries, massage, hair spa and famous Vietnamese egg coffee shops. Everything is within walking distance.
The hotel features warm, earthy tones with soft lighting to create a relaxing ambiance. KiN Hotel Ly Tu Trong Edition features a textured, rust-colored wall to add character and depth to the space. We kept the furniture minimalist and functional for a more spacious staying experience.

hotel_description:
This colonial-style 1920 landmark sits in the heart of Ho Chi Minh city and overlooks the Saigon River. Offering boutique-style accommodations, Hotel Majestic Saigon also houses an outdoor pool, a restaurant and skybar. Guests can also indulge in pampering massage at Areca Health Club or have a good workout at the gym. Free WiFi access is available in all areas.

Surrounded by a variety of local shopping and dining options, Hotel Majestic Saigon is 1640 feet from Opera House and 2297 feet from Ho Chi Minh City Hall. Ben Thanh Market and Noter Dame Church are within 0.6 mi away. Tan Son Nhat International Airport is 5 mi away.

Fitted with old-fashioned telephone and wood furniture, all units feature windows offering plenty of natural lights, air conditioning and personal safe. A flat-screen TV and mini-bar are included. Selected units come with tea/coffee machine, and/or has a private balcony with views. A colonial-style marble bathroom is also included, equipped with either a bathtub or shower facility, free toiletries and a hairdryer.

Hotel Majestic Saigon also has a casino. Fluently conversed in English and French, staff at the tour desk and 24-hour front desk can assist you with a variety of services, including currency exchange, luggage storage, day tour arrangement, airport transfer and car rental.

Guests can savor authentic Vietnamese cuisine at Cyclo Cafe, or European cuisine at Serenade Restaurant. The outdoor Breeze Sky Bar serves buffet breakfast in the mornings and char-grilled barbecue delights in the evenings. Chill out with a drink at M Bar before calling it a night.
